_meta.name: Launch Control XL MK2 (User Template)
_meta.description: Default mapping for Novation Launch Control XL MK2 running the custom User Template described in cowork-prompt.md §Task C. All messages on channel 1.
_meta.noteOctaveConvention: Yamaha (middle C = C3 = MIDI 60). Novation Components editor uses this convention — confirmed by the D button labelled 'A6' sending MIDI note 105.

_notes.knobRow1: K[1,1]=masterN, K[1,2]=masterD, K[1,3]=mode toggle, K[1,4]=bridge (CC 16), K[1,5..7]=unassigned, K[1,8]=repeat rate.
_notes.knobRows2_3: K[2,*]=tracks 1-8, K[3,*]=tracks 9-16. Default routes to N; holding D rewrites to the track's D knob in onCCMapped.
_notes.faders: F[4,1..8] CC 77-84 = fader_col0..fader_col7. Pad-modal: routes to trackN_gate (10..500ms) of the held pad's track in the same column. Inactive unless (no M/S/D/R) AND (REC off) AND (some pad in that column held). Row 2 wins over row 1 when both held.
_notes.pads_row1: P[1,1..8] = tracks 1-8. Notes 41..44 (F1, F#1, G1, G#1) and 57..60 (A2, A#2, B2, C3) in Yamaha labelling — matches the Novation Components editor's 'F1-C3' label for row 1. Non-contiguous on purpose: row 1 pads 1-4 are one chromatic run, pads 5-8 are a second run an octave up.
_notes.pads_row2: P[2,1..8] = tracks 9-16. Notes 73..76 (C#4, D4, D#4, E4) and 89..92 (F5, F#5, G5, G#5) in Yamaha labelling — matches the editor's 'C#4-G#5' range for row 2. Same two-run layout as row 1, one full octave higher.
_notes.pads: Bound to trackN_rec; store checks modifier state and rewrites to doMute / doSolo / doClr when M / S / D is held.
_notes.rightNav: SS1 (CC 104)=Snapshot Save, rewritten to clearSnapshot when D is held; LED off when no snapshot exists. SS2 (CC 105)=Beat Repeat momentary. TS1 (CC 106)=Snapshot Recall (スナップショット APPLY, LED off when no snapshot). TS2 (CC 107)=Master Apply (Transition).
_notes.rightButtons: D=A6 (note 105) / M=A#6 (note 106) / S=B6 (note 107) / R=C7 (note 108). Routed as mod_d/m/s/r through onModifierChange; tap and hold are distinguished inside useMidiModifiers.
_notes.chord_DM: Pressing M while D is held fires ALL MUTE via onDMChord and suppresses both keys' tap actions on release.
_notes.octave_convention_note: Note numbers above are raw MIDI. They match what Novation Components displays when its 'Note' dropdown uses the Yamaha convention (middle C = C3 = 60). Confirmed experimentally: pressing the D button, which the editor labels 'A6', emits MIDI note 105 (= A6 in Yamaha). Earlier versions of this file were off by 12 because they were written as if the editor used Scientific Pitch Notation (middle C = C4).
